title: Estate Duty (Exchange of Information) (Kenya) Declaration Order, 1965
title_en: Estate Duty (Exchange of Information) (Kenya) Declaration Order, 1965

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Estate Duty (Exchange of Information) (Kenya) Declaration Order.

Arrangements have been made whereby the Estate Duty Commissioner shall, if so required, give such information as may be available to him and relevant to the assessment of the duty payable in respect of the estate of a deceased person to the Estate Duty Commissioner of Kenya provided that no information shall be given which would disclose any trade secret or trade process.
